title: lastrea macrotis
intro: Lastrea macrotis, also known as the Macrotis fern or the Lady's fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea macrotis include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of Lastrea macrotis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support respiratory health and immune function.
